description: Execute task implementation: verify preparation, dispatch sequential code children per subtask plan, verify completion

steps.title: Pre-execution gate
steps.description: Verify preparation output exists for task {{task_id}} — locate subtask plan and session export, extract subtask list ({{subtask_count}} subtasks), build todo list. HALT if no subtask plan exists.

steps.title: Execute subtask 1
steps.description: Dispatch code child for subtask 1 of {{subtask_count}} for task {{task_id}} — handoff includes subtask objective, files, acceptance criteria, and session export path. Child runs /execute-subtask workflow with punch card execute-subtask. Subtasks beyond {{subtask_count}} are skipped at runtime.

steps.title: Execute subtask 2
steps.description: Dispatch code child for subtask 2 of {{subtask_count}} for task {{task_id}} — handoff includes subtask objective, files, acceptance criteria, and prior subtask results. Child runs /execute-subtask workflow with punch card execute-subtask. Subtasks beyond {{subtask_count}} are skipped at runtime.

steps.title: Execute subtask 3
steps.description: Dispatch code child for subtask 3 of {{subtask_count}} for task {{task_id}} — handoff includes subtask objective, files, acceptance criteria, and prior subtask results. Child runs /execute-subtask workflow with punch card execute-subtask. Subtasks beyond {{subtask_count}} are skipped at runtime.

steps.title: Execute subtask 4
steps.description: Dispatch code child for subtask 4 of {{subtask_count}} for task {{task_id}} — handoff includes subtask objective, files, acceptance criteria, and prior subtask results. Child runs /execute-subtask workflow with punch card execute-subtask. Subtasks beyond {{subtask_count}} are skipped at runtime.

steps.title: Execute subtask 5
steps.description: Dispatch code child for subtask 5 of {{subtask_count}} for task {{task_id}} — handoff includes subtask objective, files, acceptance criteria, and prior subtask results. Child runs /execute-subtask workflow with punch card execute-subtask. Subtasks beyond {{subtask_count}} are skipped at runtime.

steps.title: Verify completion
steps.description: Confirm all {{subtask_count}} subtasks for task {{task_id}} are marked COMPLETE — review success criteria from prep phase, roll up runtime attestations (model, mode, files, gate results) from each child, run punch card checkpoint for process-orchestrate.
